title: grammitis spathulata
intro: Grammitis spathulata, also known as the golden spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Grammitis spathulata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to be used in herbal medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
